top_signals.title: Putin-Xi talks revive stalled Russian gas pipeline as Iran war rattles energy markets
top_signals.summary: Putin is expected to hold talks with Chinese leader Xi Jinping on Wednesday, with the long-stalled Power of Siberia 2 natural gas pipeline topping the agenda.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: European stocks to open lower: UK inflation and elevated bond yields in focus
top_signals.summary: European stocks are expected to open in negative territory on Wednesday as global markets keep a close eye on elevated bond yields and UK inflation data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: More US troop withdrawals from Europe expected, NATO commander says
top_signals.summary: Gen. Alexus Grynkewich said Europe should "absolutely" expect additional U.S. troop withdrawals as NATO allies provide more of their own defense.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Why fashion is doubling down on sustainability even as value-seeking shoppers ignore the pitch
top_signals.summary: A strange paradox has taken hold of the global fashion industry.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: Public service pensions: 2024 valuations
top_signals.summary: This is a technical note on actuarial valuations of the public service pension schemes.
